{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = Jade scepter badge
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|One of the elders in [[Sacred Valley]] wears a [[Jade scepter badge]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
